meaning: n.[生理]由外界刺激引起的不随意运动(或反应)
examples: How many of you believe in psycho-kinesis? Raise my hand.
How many of you believe in psycho - kinesis Raise my hand.
AIM: to probe into the exactitude of color kinesis in assessing the systolic velocity of cardiac muscle.
Why not apply the maximum kinesis to that action?
